docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,950.00 FILED BY KITOVER, RAFAEL AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-08-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KITOVER, RAFAEL ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $25.00 SERVED FEB-12-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-08-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-08-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF RAFAEL KITOVER IS NOT PRESENT BUT APPEARING ON HIS BEHALF IS HIS MOTHER NINA GURALNIK. DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2025 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KITOVER, RAFAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMCAST CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
